# Managed Block Example

Illustrative (a real run derives every row from disk; your skills and categories will differ). Shows the marker pair, the generated comment, category `###` subsections, and the bullet row shape (`- [name](link) — description`, no table, no kind column). The `## Skills` heading above the opening marker is human-authored and left untouched.

````text
## Skills

<!-- skills:start -->
<!-- Generated by bootstrapping-readme — do not edit by hand; rerun the skill. -->

### apply-chain

- [grilling](skills/apply-chain/grilling/SKILL.md) — Use before any creative or build work to turn a fuzzy idea into a shared, concrete design.
- [writing-specs](skills/apply-chain/writing-specs/SKILL.md) — Use to turn an approved design or written requirements into a concrete spec.

### authoring

- [writing-skills](skills/authoring/writing-skills/SKILL.md) — Test-first methodology for authoring, editing, and validating skills.

### entrypoints

- [sdd](skills/entrypoints/sdd/SKILL.md) — Run the full spec-driven pipeline end-to-end on a feature or change.

<!-- skills:end -->
````

Flat-render variant (a repo whose skills sit directly under ROOT with no category folders) — one bullet list, no `###`:

````text
<!-- skills:start -->
<!-- Generated by bootstrapping-readme — do not edit by hand; rerun the skill. -->

- [deploy](skills/deploy/SKILL.md) — Ship the current branch to staging.

<!-- skills:end -->
````
